meaning: adj.[医]非常好色的,性欲过度的,纵欲的
examples: Hypersexual disorder is another that will not be included to the DSM-V, though some argued for its addition.
Sufferers sleep for several days at a time, and when they wake up, they are irritable, ravenously hungry and sometimes hypersexual.
This, too, was when the lurid sexual dimension of rabies infection came to the fore, as medical reports began to stress the hypersexual behavior of some end-stage rabies patients.
